prompt: The AST output-equivalence relation in @prune/equivalence is semantically blind in several cases: code transforms that actually change behavior are still judged equivalent. The package's test suite currently has failing tests covering these cases. Fix the equivalence logic so behavior-changing transforms are no longer considered equivalent, choosing the safer default where the relation cannot be sure.
notes: Reference: tcrp harden AST equivalence (5 semantic-blindness bugs) 2026-06-01.
